description: Mimi Course Generator is best for course leading, auditing, publishing among more.
author: Judy N.
pros: Best suite for media import and course leading, authorization and simple template with beautiful GUI design for adaptive to it performance.
cons: Nothing to register since it meets all it was meant for.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Not sponsored or affiliated - Unbiased review - I just really like this program.
description: We really love this program. It creates quick, usable classes. The graphics are usually on point too - which is a rare treat for AI. We upgraded to the highest tier. Mustafa and his team are excellent when you need support and lightning fast.
author: Eme R.
pros: Minicoursegenerator is an easy way to add valuable content for my site that customers actually want. We've generated a many courses just to get new content ideas too!
cons: There really aren't too many cons for us - if I had to think of any, the look/skin function could be easier to replicate - but honestly, that feels pretty nitpicky.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Mini Course Generator - Editor should be good.
description: Not good. I was disappointed with their course authoring experience which is the most crucial feature and point for this tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of creating and making short courses with clear instructions and an easy to understand onboarding video + it's not expensive tool.
cons: The writing experience for writing courses is horrible. They should come up with better editor and the whole experience around writing and publishing courses. Also doesn't have wysiwyg editor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Solid App. Something I've used for years. Great support and transparent communication from the [sensitive content hidden]. Always updated. What more can you ask? Build out your free course in 5 minutes with the AI builder and go get some leads!
author: Shakoor C.
pros: Usability and Speed. You could have a minicourse made in less than 5 minutes ready to go as a viable lead magnet in growing your email subscribers or attracting new customers. Support was fantastic as well. Always got back to me in 24 hours. Quick to implement changes and bug fixes. They also are not afraid to try new things. This app has been upgraded multiple times with new features.
cons: Sometimes the new upgrades break down something that was working in the past. That is a headache especially when you are running PAID ads to one of your mini courses.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy to use. Great to display a single course or a bundle of courses.
description: Was what I was looking for to display course materials in an user-friendly format without having to create a format from scratch.
author: Randy M.
pros: Easy to use. Great to use when you want to display course materials when a full blown course is not needed.
cons: Initially understanding the configuration to display course bundles.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's great to have a tool where I can create my own interactive mini-courses to help me generate leads. This is an easy to use software that is very playful and innovative. I've enjoyed working with it. I've learnt a lot from creating the courses. I now have a fun, interactive way to help my readers learn about my niche. I recommend it to anyone who wants to create their own mini-courses. I have also launched a product on Product Hunt by using Mini Course generator and generate lots of leads than I could ever imagine.
author: Mehmet Emre A.
pros: It's a lightweight mini course product. I love its simplicity and interactive features. I am also big fan of interactive courses, I think best way of reinforce learning process.
cons: Development team are adding new features every week. I'm quite satisfied about product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience is good. It is very easy to use both of me & student. So I am using it.
author: Md Billal Hossain S.
pros: - Easy to use - Can create any type of course within a short time. - No need any web technical knowledge. - Easy UI helps my student to understand it very quickly.
cons: - Little bit slow the system. Need improve in support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Their service is professional and reliable
author: Md Abdul H.
pros: I have tried to create my own mini courses but I was not able to find the right software. I came across this website and they had a free trial, so I decided to give it a try. It is amazing! They are super responsive and helpful, they helped me every step of the way until my course was published on their platform. The customer service is excellent as well!
cons: I have been using their service for a while now and I am very satisfied with the results. I was looking for an affordable way to help my business generate more leads and improve customer engagement, so I decided to try this tool. The Mini Course Generator is not only cheap but also easy-to-use. It has helped me create my first mini course in minutes! All you need is a text editor (and some graphics) and after that it's as simple as pie: copy, paste, publish!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Askin T.
pros: Courses can be prepared very quickly. Easy to use. The course customization features are also nice.
cons: The end page could have been more customizable. I felt the end page was missing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software to create your mini course super fast
description: Test my course idea effectively and help me a lot to engage more leads. Easy to use as well.
author: Benny V.
pros: Create Mini-Course extremely fast and save my time. Not only that which can share the link to my social media network for just a short time. Fully recommended.
cons: So far everything is fine, and they are upgrading even better with new features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is so easy to create a new course. It's cheap for user and understandable. It has a simple and elegant interface.
cons: More suitable for small courses. maybe improvement can be made for more complex courses.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Mini Course Generator is a useful and innovative product. I really liked it but i cannot use it all the time because I don't create mini courses so often. For me, i used Mini Course Generator for talking about a new concept in my startup or guiding about how-to-dos for new employees. It is really helpful and engage people.
author: Şeyma A.
pros: Building a course using blocks is easy and new cool feature. I didn't see something like before and it really facilitates creating part.
cons: I couldn't exactly understand how to use Mini course generator at first. I have to try and fail on something. So I think there should be a user guide and add some titles or labels to features. For example on the left side of the course generator page there is a bar. But i couldn't understand what that bar does at first. Then i click on something and i see that "Oh so this add new stories great."
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I needed a tool to create a course fast and easily and I found this. This tool is a cloud based course creator that takes the hassle out of creating a course from scratch, and it's easy to use. The best part is I don't need to worry about tech issues because my courses are always available to me wherever I go. It's perfect for anyone who's looking to share information with colleagues, clients, or the public.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's cloud based course generator, so me and colleagues can reach from anywhere trough course link. It's easy-to use and fancy tool to create awesome courses for sharing information between individuals or teams.
cons: Dashboards sould be developed instead of excel file.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Varish V.
pros: Engagement is more important in the class. By assesment tool / achievement learners are engaged in class.
cons: Some type of premium subscription like recurring payments can be done.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best software to make simple mini courses
description: I found this website to be easy to use, easy to understand, and easy to create a course. It felt almost as easy as taking notes and then having a course created from notes.
author: Trevion C.
pros: The simplicity of the website is amazing. A child could make an online course in just a few minutes without any help which is perfect for me.
cons: More features for what can be inside of the course would be greatly appreciated. This will allow for more leg room when being creative and teaching.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is good and easy to use for new teachers or teach something to people. That software new, i think in a few years user count increase.
cons: It is good for news but its documentation is less for other software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mini Course Generator - Simply Quick Starter
author: Tuhin T.
pros: I'm impressed with how quickly anyone will be able to create mini-courses, it's a great idea to have a quick and easy way to do so - not much learning curve . People are always looking for ways to learn new skills, and it is quite interactive. Loved the card like layout for creating the course content pages.
cons: Mini Course generator is a very simple to use , probably you can get your course content going just spending few minutes. In App Dashboards can be worked up for analytics and reporting.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Alfredo M.
pros: It’s easy to use. You can design a simple course in few minutes. Also, you can add surveys, quizzes, videos, embed codes from a diversity of platforms and add custom domains.
cons: Embedding some codes from another platforms is complicated or shows an error. Maybe I’m making a mistake. But this tool is excellent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best course builder and generator for first-timers

cons: It would also be great if this could support integration with Notion.
